expected_query:
MATCH (p:Person {id: 933})
RETURN p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName, p.birthday, p.creationDate
generated_query:
MATCH (p:Person {id: 933})
RETURN p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName, p.birthday, p.creationDate

expected_query:
MATCH (p:Post)
WHERE p.creationDate >= datetime('2010-06-01T00:00:00') AND p.creationDate < datetime('2010-07-01T00:00:00')
RETURN p.id, p.creationDate, p.content
generated_query:
MATCH (p:Post)
WHERE p.creationDate >= datetime('2010-06-01T00:00:00') AND p.creationDate < datetime('2010-07-01T00:00:00')
RETURN p.id, p.creationDate, p.content

MATCH (p:Person)
WHERE p.firstName = 'Mahinda'
RETURN p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName

sql:
SELECT f.id, f.title, COUNT(*) AS member_count
FROM forum f
JOIN forum_has_member fhm ON fhm.forum_id = f.id
GROUP BY f.id, f.title
ORDER BY member_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
expected_query:
MATCH (f:Forum)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:Person)
RETURN f.id, f.title, count(p) AS member_count
ORDER BY member_count DESC
LIMIT 10
generated_query:
MATCH (f:Forum)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:Person)
RETURN f.id, f.title, count(*) AS member_count
ORDER BY member_count DESC
LIMIT 10

sql:
SELECT t.id, t.name, COUNT(*) AS usage_count
FROM tag t
JOIN (
  SELECT tag_id FROM post_has_tag
  UNION ALL
  SELECT tag_id FROM comment_has_tag
) mt ON mt.tag_id = t.id
GROUP BY t.id, t.name
ORDER BY usage_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
expected_query:
MATCH (m)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t:Tag)
WHERE m:Post OR m:Comment
RETURN t.id, t.name, count(m) AS usage_count
ORDER BY usage_count DESC
LIMIT 20
generated_query:
MATCH (t:Tag)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(n)
WHERE n:Post OR n:Comment
RETURN t.id AS id, t.name AS name, count(*) AS usage_count
ORDER BY usage_count DESC
LIMIT 20

sql:
SELECT p2.id, p2.first_name, p2.last_name, k.creation_date AS friendship_date
FROM person p1
JOIN knows k ON k.person_id = p1.id
JOIN person p2 ON p2.id = k.friend_id
WHERE p1.id = 933;
expected_query:
MATCH (p1:Person {id: 933})-[k:KNOWS]->(p2:Person)
RETURN p2.id, p2.firstName, p2.lastName, k.creationDate AS friendship_date
generated_query:
MATCH (p1:Person {id: 933})-[k:KNOWS]->(p2:Person)
RETURN p2.id, p2.firstName, p2.lastName, k.creationDate AS friendship_date

sql:
SELECT po.id, po.content, p.first_name, p.last_name, t.name
FROM post po
JOIN person p ON p.id = po.creator_person_id
JOIN post_has_tag pht ON pht.post_id = po.id
JOIN tag t ON t.id = pht.tag_id
WHERE po.creation_date >= '2010-06-01' AND po.creation_date < '2010-06-02';
expected_query:
MATCH (p:Person)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(po:Post)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t:Tag)
WHERE po.creationDate >= datetime('2010-06-01T00:00:00') AND po.creationDate < datetime('2010-06-02T00:00:00')
RETURN po.id, po.content, p.firstName, p.lastName, t.name
generated_query:
MATCH (po:Post)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(p:Person),
      (po)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t:Tag)
WHERE po.creationDate >= datetime('2010-06-01T00:00:00') AND po.creationDate < datetime('2010-06-02T00:00:00')
RETURN po.id, po.content, p.firstName, p.lastName, t.name

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p3.id, p3.first_name, p3.last_name, t.name AS shared_tag
FROM person p1
JOIN knows k1 ON k1.person_id = p1.id
JOIN knows k2 ON k2.person_id = k1.friend_id
JOIN person p3 ON p3.id = k2.friend_id
JOIN has_interest hi1 ON hi1.person_id = p1.id
JOIN has_interest hi3 ON hi3.person_id = p3.id AND hi3.tag_id = hi1.tag_id
JOIN tag t ON t.id = hi1.tag_id
WHERE p1.id = 933 AND p3.id <> p1.id;
expected_query:
MATCH (p1:Person {id: 933})-[:KNOWS]->(:Person)-[:KNOWS]->(p3:Person),
      (p1)-[:HAS_INTEREST]->(t:Tag)<-[:HAS_INTEREST]-(p3)
WHERE p3.id <> p1.id
RETURN DISTINCT p3.id, p3.firstName, p3.lastName, t.name AS shared_tag
generated_query:
MATCH (p1:Person {id: 933})-[:KNOWS]->(f:Person)-[:KNOWS]->(p3:Person),
      (p1)-[:HAS_INTEREST]->(t:Tag)<-[:HAS_INTEREST]-(p3)
WHERE p3.id <> p1.id
RETURN DISTINCT p3.id, p3.firstName, p3.lastName, t.name AS shared_tag

sql:
SELECT c.id AS comment_id, c.content, c.creation_date, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM comment c
JOIN person p ON p.id = c.creator_person_id
WHERE c.reply_of_post_id = 412317942891
ORDER BY c.creation_date DESC;
expected_query:
MATCH (c:Comment)-[:REPLY_OF]->(:Post {id: 412317942891}),
      (c)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(p:Person)
RETURN c.id AS comment_id, c.content, c.creationDate, p.firstName, p.lastName
ORDER BY c.creationDate DESC
generated_query:
MATCH (c:Comment)-[:REPLY_OF]->(:Post {id: 412317942891}),
      (c)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(p:Person)
RETURN c.id AS comment_id, c.content, c.creationDate, p.firstName, p.lastName
ORDER BY c.creationDate DESC

sql:
SELECT f.id, f.title, COUNT(fhm.person_id) AS member_count
FROM forum f
LEFT JOIN forum_has_member fhm ON fhm.forum_id = f.id
GROUP BY f.id, f.title
ORDER BY member_count DESC;
expected_query:
MATCH (f:Forum)
OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:Person)
RETURN f.id, f.title, count(p) AS member_count
ORDER BY member_count DESC
generated_query:
MATCH (f:Forum)
OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:Person)
RETURN f.id, f.title, count(p) AS member_count
ORDER BY member_count DESC

sql:
SELECT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, COUNT(*) AS friend_count
FROM person p
JOIN knows k ON k.person_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY friend_count DESC;
expected_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:KNOWS]->(friend:Person)
WITH p, count(friend) AS friend_count
WHERE friend_count > 5
RETURN p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName, friend_count
ORDER BY friend_count DESC
generated_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:KNOWS]->(friend:Person)
WITH p, count(friend) AS friend_count
WHERE friend_count > 5
RETURN p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName, friend_count
ORDER BY friend_count DESC

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM person p
JOIN post po ON po.creator_person_id = p.id
WHERE po.forum_id = 137439023186
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM person p
JOIN likes_post l ON l.person_id = p.id
JOIN post po ON po.id = l.post_id
WHERE po.forum_id = 137439023186;
expected_query:
MATCH (f:Forum {id: 137439023186})-[:CONTAINER_OF]->(po:Post)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(p:Person)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName
UNION
MATCH (f:Forum {id: 137439023186})-[:CONTAINER_OF]->(po:Post)<-[:LIKES]-(p:Person)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName
generated_query:
MATCH (f:Forum {id: 137439023186})-[:CONTAINER_OF]->(po:Post)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(p:Person)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id AS id, p.firstName AS firstName, p.lastName AS lastName
UNION
MATCH (f:Forum {id: 137439023186})-[:CONTAINER_OF]->(po:Post)<-[:LIKES]-(p:Person)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id AS id, p.firstName AS firstName, p.lastName AS lastName

expected_query:
MATCH (p:Person)
WHERE NOT (p)-[:KNOWS]->(:Person)
RETURN p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName
generated_query:
MATCH (p:Person)
WHERE NOT (p)-[:KNOWS]->(:Person)
RETURN p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName

sql:
SELECT country.name AS country_name, COUNT(p.id) AS person_count
FROM person p
JOIN place city ON p.place_id = city.id
JOIN place country ON city.partof_id = country.id
GROUP BY country.name;
expected_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]->(:Place)-[:IS_PART_OF]->(country:Place)
RETURN country.name AS country_name, count(p) AS person_count
generated_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]->(city:Place)-[:IS_PART_OF]->(country:Place)
RETURN country.name AS country_name, count(p.id) AS person_count

sql:
WITH RECURSIVE place_hierarchy AS (
  SELECT id, name, type, partof_id, 0 AS depth
  FROM place
  WHERE id = 111
  UNION ALL
  SELECT p.id, p.name, p.type, p.partof_id, ph.depth + 1
  FROM place p
  JOIN place_hierarchy ph ON p.id = ph.partof_id
)
SELECT id, name, type, depth
FROM place_hierarchy
ORDER BY depth;
expected_query:
MATCH path = (start:Place {id: 111})-[:IS_PART_OF*0..]->(a:Place)
RETURN a.id AS id, a.name AS name, a.type AS type, length(path) AS depth
ORDER BY depth
generated_query:
MATCH path = (start:Place {id: 111})-[:IS_PART_OF*0..]->(p:Place)
RETURN p.id AS id, p.name AS name, p.type AS type, length(path) AS depth
ORDER BY depth
